name: neuro-commerce-os-marketplace
description: The Neuro-Commerce OS — a complete autonomous business operating system for Claude. Diagnostic → Brand → Content → Ads, with its own MCP server.

plugins.name: neuro-commerce-os
plugins.description: Complete Neuro-Commerce OS v2.0: 5 phases, 18 skills, 22 agents, state-machine-enforced execution, SQLite FTS5 RAG memory + Token Shield, intent routing, locked-character video, NeuroSystem + Synapse, Zero-Command MCP Apps UI, scraper routing, local n8n automation, NextLuma decks. Standalone MCP server with 36 tools, 41 resources, 4 prompts.
